creator: jkeenan@pobox.com
text:
Created attachment 190084
Update misc/p5-List-Compare from 0.37 to 0.53

This patch updates misc/p5-List-Compare to the most recent version released to CPAN, 0.53.  As a result of profiling the performance of certain methods has been improved.  Other CPAN distributions for which I am preparing ports require a more recent version than 0.37.
